```
#!/bin/bash
if [[ $EUID -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "Must run as root" >&2
  exit 1
fi
cp /etc/shadow /etc/shadow.bak
# Log file
LOG=/var/log/chage-90days.log
echo "$(date): Starting maximum password age enforcement" >> "$LOG"
# Get UID_MAX from login.defs
max_uid=$(awk '/^UID_MAX/ {print $2}' /etc/login.defs)
if [[ -z $max_uid ]]; then max_uid=60000; fi
awk -F: -v max="$max_uid" '$3>=1000 && $3<=max && $1!="root" && substr($2,1,1)!="!" && substr($2,1,1)!="*" {print $1}' /etc/shadow |
xargs -n1 -r -I{} sh -c 'chage -M 90 "$@"' sh {} |
tee -a "$LOG"
echo "$(date): Completed" >> "$LOG"
```

```
#!/bin/bash
set -e
# Ensure script runs as root
if [ "$(id -u)" -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "Must run as root" >&2
  exit 1
fi
# Backup shadow
cp /etc/shadow /etc/shadow.bak.$(date +%s)
# Determine max UID from /etc/login.defs
MAX_UID=$(awk '/^UID_MAX/ {print $2}' /etc/login.defs)
: ${MAX_UID:=60000}
# Loop over users
awk -F: -v max=$MAX_UID '$3>=1000 && $3<=max && $1!="root" && $2!~/[!*]/ {print $1}' /etc/shadow | while read -r user; do
  # Apply max age 90
  chage -M 90 "$user"
done
```

#!/bin/bash
set -e
if [[ $EUID -ne 0 ]]; then
  echo "Must run as root" >&2
  exit 1
fi
# backup
cp /etc/shadow /etc/shadow.bak.$(date +%s)
# determine max uid
MAX_UID=$(awk '/^UID_MAX/ {print $2}' /etc/login.defs)
: ${MAX_UID:=60000}
LOG=/var/log/chage-90days.log
date >> "$LOG"
awk -F: -v max=$MAX_UID '$3>=1000 && $3<=max && $1!="root" && $2!~/[!*]/ {print $1}' /etc/shadow |
while read -r u; do
  chage -M 90 "$u" >>"$LOG" 2>&1
done
date >> "$LOG"

Let's craft the content: 

```
#!/bin/bash
set -e
if [ "$(id -u)" -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "Must run as root" >&2
  exit 1
fi
cp /etc/shadow /etc/shadow.bak.$(date +%s)
MAX_UID=$(awk '/^UID_MAX/ {print $2}' /etc/login.defs)
: ${MAX_UID:=60000}
awk -F: -v max=$MAX_UID '$3>=1000 && $3<=max && $1!~"root" && $2!~/[!*]/ && ($5=="" || $5>90) {print $1}' /etc/shadow | while read -r user; do chage -M 90 "$user"; done
```
